title: TTIGRAAS : That Time I Got Reincarnated As A Superhero!
description:
Welcome to That Time I Got Reincarnated As A Superhero modpack!

In this pack you can gain superhuman abilities from all your favourite comics like marvel and dc! , as well as several mutant abilities!
body:
Welcome to That Time I Got Reincarnated As A Superhero modpack!

In this pack you can gain superhuman abilities from all your favourite comics like marvel and dc! , as well as several mutant abilities, but whats more is you can create HUGE reactors to power your base and use Psi magic systems and tempad's to help you explore a vast open world and so much more!
